title: Pi is INCREDIBLE - Building a Custom Coding Agent Live
summary: Pi is a minimalist coding agent framework with a tiny core of core functions (read, write, edit, bash) designed to be extensible. It supports multiple models including Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7, and Qwen 3.6, and allows users to install extensions from npm and git or write custom ones.
